modelIntro.title: Why Text to Video with Seedance 2.0
description: Text-to-video turns written prompts into 1080p clips in one step. Seedance 2.0 reads natural language and outputs 15-second multi-shot videos with motion, lighting, and camera work. No storyboards or editing software needed.
Add up to 9 reference images for style control, or keep it text-only for fast iteration. Same pipeline for social shorts, ad concepts, and storyboard previews.
Free online. No sign-up—describe your scene and generate.

hero.h1: Free Text to Video AI Generator
hero.desc: Create 1080p videos from text prompts with Seedance 2.0 for free. Enter your idea and let AI generate Hollywood-quality video online. No sign-up required.

intro.title: Why Use Text to Video with Seedance 2.0?

content.title: From Words to Motion in Seconds
content.text: Text-to-video AI transforms your written ideas into moving visuals instantly. Seedance 2.0 understands natural language and generates 15-second high-quality videos with complex motions, proper lighting, and cinematic camera movements. Perfect for content creators, marketers, and filmmakers who need to prototype ideas quickly without expensive production. Simply describe your scene—the AI handles the rest. No storyboard skills, no video editing software, no production crew required. Turn concepts into reality in minutes.

content.title: Beyond Text-Only: Multimodal Power for Precision
content.text: While text prompts alone are powerful, Seedance 2.0 lets you combine text with up to 9 reference images, 3 video clips, and 3 audio clips. Add visual references to guide character style, include sample footage for consistency, or sync with audio—all in one generation. This multimodal approach gives you unprecedented control over the final output. Stuck on a specific look? Upload a reference image. Need consistent branding? Add your logo. The text-to-video generator becomes a complete creative studio when you layer inputs.

content.title: Free Online Access for All Creators
content.text: Toolaze provides free text-to-video generation with Seedance 2.0 online. No sign-up, no credit card, no usage caps for getting started. Whether you're testing a social media concept, pitching a film idea, or creating ad variations, the free AI video generator is ready. Works entirely in your browser—no software installation. Generate 1080p Hollywood-quality videos from text in seconds, then download and use anywhere.

faq.q: Is text to video really free?
faq.a: Yes! Toolaze offers free text-to-video generation with Seedance 2.0 online. No sign-up or registration required. You can create videos from text prompts at no cost. There are no hidden fees or credit card requirements. Start generating 1080p videos immediately. For advanced features or higher volume, check our pricing—but the core text-to-video functionality is free to use.

faq.q: What is the best text to video AI?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 is among the leading text-to-video AI models in 2026. It supports multimodal inputs (text + image + video + audio), generates 1080p quality, and offers director-level control over lighting and camera. Toolaze provides free access online. Other strong options include Sora 2 and Runway—compare based on your specific needs for resolution, input types, and control level.

faq.q: How long can Seedance 2.0 videos be?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 generates 15-second high-quality multi-shot videos per generation. This length is ideal for social media (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), advertisements, and concept previews. For longer content, create multiple 15-second clips and combine them in video editing software. The model optimizes for quality within this duration.

faq.q: Can I add reference images to text prompts?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 supports up to 9 reference images along with your text prompt. Combine text and images for more precise control over style, characters, and scenes. This is especially useful for consistent branding, character design, or when words alone can't capture the visual you want. The multimodal approach sets Seedance 2.0 apart from text-only generators.

faq.q: Does text to video work in my browser?
faq.a: Yes. Toolaze runs Seedance 2.0 online in your browser. No software installation needed. Enter your text prompt and generate videos directly from the web interface. Works on Windows, Mac, and most modern browsers. You'll need an internet connection since the AI model runs on servers.

faq.q: What makes a good text prompt for video generation?
faq.a: Good prompts include: specific scene description (setting, time of day), action or motion (what happens), style (cinematic, documentary, animated), lighting (dramatic, soft, neon), and mood. The more specific you are, the better the output. Example: 'A woman walks through a rainy Tokyo street at night, neon signs reflecting on wet pavement, cinematic lighting, slow motion.'

faq.q: Can I generate video with sound from text?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 uses a unified audio-video joint generation architecture. You can generate 15-second videos with dual-channel audio simultaneously. For text-only input, the model may generate appropriate ambient sound or you can add audio clips as reference. The text-to-video generator supports full multimodal input including audio.
